$comment: Design token file for the Tile component
$description: A 173px-wide card tile used for dashboard stats, selection controls, and navigation. Five types: Stats (metric + tag, auto height), Radio (radio button right), Checkbox (checkbox right), Navigate (chevron-right right), Toggle (toggle switch right). Control types (Radio/Checkbox/Navigate/Toggle) have a fixed 86px height. All types share the same container shell (white background, 12px radius, sm shadow, 12px padding). State drives the border: Default = 1px gray/200, Selected = 3px primary blue (the thicker border gives a strong selection ring). Radio, Checkbox, Toggle, and Tag sub-components are from the HighRise component library.

width.description: Fixed width for all tile types

background.description: White card background for all types and states

padding.description: 12px inset on all sides of the tile

gap.description: 8px vertical gap between the main content area and any secondary row within the tile

border-radius.description: 12px corner radius on the tile card

shadow.description: Subtle elevation — two-layer drop shadow (0px 1px 2px rgba(16,24,40,0.05) + 0px 1px 3px rgba(16,24,40,0.10))

color.description: #eaecf0 — subtle gray border in unselected Default state

width.description: Thicker border in Selected state — gives a strong visual selection ring

typography.description: 15px Semibold, 20px line-height — tile heading/label text (new xl size in the body scale)

row-height.description: Fixed height of the label row container

row-gap.description: Gap between inline elements within the label row (e.g. label text and a badge)

description.description: Optional body text shown below the label in control-type tiles (Radio/Checkbox/Navigate/Toggle)

color.description: #101828 — same color as label; weight difference (Regular vs Semibold) creates hierarchy

height.description: Fixed container height for the description text block — constrains multi-line overflow

control-tile.description: Layout constraints applied to the four control types: Radio, Checkbox, Navigate, Toggle

height.description: Fixed height for all control-type tiles (Radio/Checkbox/Navigate/Toggle); Stats type uses auto height

right-icon-size.description: Width and height of the right-side icon area for Navigate, Checkbox, and Radio types

navigate-icon.description: GHL icon name for the Navigate type trailing indicator

stats.description: Stats-type specific tokens. Height is auto/content-driven. Top row shows a label and a 24px icon; bottom row shows a large numeric stat and a Tag.

top-row-icon-size.description: Width and height of the optional icon displayed in the top-right of the stats tile

typography.description: 24px Semibold, 32px line-height — large numeric display value (e.g. '12')
